- C (x=2): y = (2 + 1) mod 4 = 3. 3 maps to G. So C -> G.
- G (x=3): y = (3 + 1) mod 4 = 0. 0 maps to A. So G -> A.

A -> T
T -> C
C -> G
G -> A
